tool_input.command:
python -c "from pathlib import Path; from collections import Counter; import os; base=Path('memory/long_term'); c=Counter(); samples=[]
for p in base.iterdir():
 n=p.name
 if n=='index.json': cat='index.json'
 elif n.startswith('memory_item_') and n.endswith('.json'): cat='memory_item json'
 elif n.startswith('summary_') and n.endswith('.json'): cat='summary json'
 elif n.startswith('index.') and n.endswith('.tmp'): cat='index.*.tmp'
 else: cat='other'; samples.append((n,p.stat().st_size))
 c[cat]+=1
print('categories', dict(c)); print('other samples', samples[:20])"
